subcodes.first_line: In the calamity that befell the people of God in that land, the sun lamented, the lamp wept, the earth trembled, and the heavens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در مصیبت حزب الهی در آن ارض آفتاب نوحه نمود و سراج گریست و ارض مضطرب و سما
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @consolation and comfort, @chastisement and requital, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
